privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from the SpamAssassin public mail corpus. Justin Mason (jm@jmason.org) is the verified creator and former VP of Apache SpamAssassin. However, the actual email corpus contains ZERO messages from jm@jmason.org and only 1-2 emails genuinely mentioning Justin Mason; the setup script's assumption that the corpus 'naturally contains these' emails is contradicted by corpus analysis. The task's synthetic email recipient (legal-audit@company.com) and folder names are task-specific artifacts.
